title: scaphochlamys perakensis
intro: Scaphochlamys perakensis, also known as the Perak ginger or Penaga Putih, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scaphochlamys perakensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Scaphochlamys perakensis is often made into a tea or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
